title: PropertyManager Pro - Property Management Platform
seoTitle: PropertyManager Pro - Property Management Platform - Free Real Estate Website Template | Multiverse
metaDescription: PropertyManager Pro - Complete property management solutions for landlords and real estate investors
summary: PropertyManager Pro - Complete property management solutions for landlords and real estate investors
description: PropertyManager Pro - Complete property management solutions for landlords and real estate investors
audience: Real Estate brands and product teams
prompt: Build a premium real estate website inspired by PropertyManager Pro - Property Management Platform. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.
layoutNotes: Imported from Website Template Hub as a local source-backed template.
Preview and downloadable code are generated from the original HTML source.
Asset paths are normalized so the template can preview inside Multiverse.
responsiveNotes: Responsive layout comes from the original one-page template source.
Preview uses the real HTML file instead of a synthetic poster image.

files.summary: Main template source file imported from Website Template Hub.
files.content:
PropertyManager Pro
Features Solutions Pricing Contact
Features Solutions Pricing Contact
Smart Property Management

Manage Properties Effortlessly

Automate rent collection, tenant communication, maintenance scheduling, and financial reporting. Save time and maximize profits.

100K+

Active Users

$2B+

Rent Collected

500K+

Properties Managed

98%

Satisfaction Rate

15 min

Setup Time

Powerful Features

Everything you need to manage properties successfully

Automated Rent Collection

Automatic recurring billing and payment processing with multiple payment methods.

Learn more

Tenant Management

Complete tenant profiles, lease management, and communication tools in one place.

Learn more

Maintenance Scheduling

Work orders, vendor management, and preventive maintenance tracking.

Learn more

Financial Reports

Detailed income statements, expense tracking, and tax-ready reports.

Learn more

Mobile App

Manage properties on the go with our iOS and Android applications.

Learn more

Data Security

Enterprise-grade encryption and compliance with industry standards.

Learn more

Solutions for Every Scale

From individual landlords to large portfolios

Single Property

Perfect for landlords managing one or a few residential properties.

  • Tenant screening tools
  • Automated rent reminders
  • Expense tracking
  • Mobile access
Most Popular

Multi-Property Portfolio

Ideal for investors managing multiple properties across different locations.

  • All Single features
  • Portfolio analytics
  • Advanced reporting
  • Priority support

Enterprise

Comprehensive solution for large-scale property management operations.

  • All features included
  • Custom integrations
  • Dedicated account manager
  • API access

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Choose the plan that fits your needs

Starter

$19/month

Up to 3 properties

  • Basic tenant management
  • Rent collection
  • Expense tracking
  • Mobile app access
BEST VALUE

Professional

$49/month

Up to 25 properties

  • All Starter features
  • Advanced reporting
  • Maintenance tracking
  • Priority support

Enterprise

Custom/pricing

Unlimited properties

  • All features included
  • Custom integrations
  • Dedicated support
  • API access

Ready to Simplify Your Management?

Start your 30-day free trial. No credit card required.
